title: Nursery Rhyme. CXXVI. Scholastic.
content:
Mistress Mary, quite contrary,
            How does your garden grow?
        With cockle-shells, and silver bells,
            And mussels all a row.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CXXVI. Scholastic." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
